case_title: JS SULLIVAN DEVELOPMENT, LLC VS. ANDREW RODRIGUEZ

docket_entries.description: SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR STEVE CONST FILED BY PLAINTIFF JS SULLIVAN DEVELOPMENT, LLC

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF JS SULLIVAN DEVELOPMENT, LLC AND DEFENDANT ANDREW RODRIGUEZ. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (D506)

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE: $ 75.00 REMARKS: I SPOKE TO AN INDIVIDUAL WHO IDENTIFIED THEMSELVES AS THE RESIDENT AND THEY STATED SUBJECT MOVED. I SPOKE WITH A NEIGHBOR WHO SAYS NOT RESIDENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF JS SULLIVAN DEVELOPMENT, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ANDREW
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,290.00 FILED BY JS SULLIVAN DEVELOPMENT, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ANDREW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-05-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR LIANA D ALESSANDRO FILED BY PLAINTIFF JS SULLIVAN DEVELOPMENT, LLC

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE: $ 75.00 REMARKS: 12/18/2024 12:25 PM: I SPOKE WITH AN INDIVIDUAL WHO IDENTIFIED THEMSELVES AS THE PERSON IN CHARGE AND THEY STATED SUBJECT UNKNOWN. JULIETTE CAME AND TOOK THE NAME UPSTAIRS, TO VERIFY BUT THIS NAME IS NOT IN HER SYSTEM, COULD NOT SEE SUBJECT WORKING AT A DIFFERENT LOCATION. FILED BY PLAINTIFF JS SULLIVAN DEVELOPMENT, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ANDREW
